infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Motion Mirror uses your location so your coach can follow your route, pace, distance, and elevation during a live session.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Motion Mirror uses background location during an active run so tracking can continue while your phone is locked or you open music.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Motion Mirror uses background location during an active run so tracking can continue while your phone is locked or you open music.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Motion Mirror uses background location during an active run so tracking can continue while your phone is locked or you open music.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Motion Mirror uses your location so your coach can follow your live run.
